prompts.name: terminal-shell
prompts.prompt:
allowlister-remote approval required

Needs your attention:
  gh pr merge 42 --squash --delete-branch

Full command:
  gh pr merge 42 --squash --delete-branch

  cwd: ~/src/allowlister-remote
Approve here or in the web app. [a]llow / [d]eny:

prompts.name: terminal-tool
prompts.prompt:
allowlister-remote approval required

Full command:
  mcp__github__create_issue

Tool input:
  {
    "owner": "nickderobertis",
    "repo": "allowlister-remote",
    "title": "Add remote approval audit log"
  }

  cwd: ~/src/allowlister-remote
Approve here or in the web app. [a]llow / [d]eny:

prompts.name: terminal-script
prompts.command:
set -euo pipefail
npm run build
for attempt in $(seq 1 30); do
  curl -fsS https://api.acme.dev/healthz
  sleep 10
done
npm publish --access public
git push origin main --tags

fragments.rule: ask before pushing to a remote

prompts.prompt:
allowlister-remote approval required

Needs your attention:
  npm publish --access public
    ask before publishing a package
  git push origin main --tags
    ask before pushing to a remote

Full command:
  set -euo pipefail
  npm run build
  for attempt in $(seq 1 30); do
    curl -fsS https://api.acme.dev/healthz
    sleep 10
  done
  npm publish --access public
  git push origin main --tags

  cwd: /workspace/acme-api
Approve here or in the web app. [a]llow / [d]eny:
